title: 👁‍🗨 Mythos Collapse Attractors
name: ‍🗨 Mythos Collapse Attractors
what_it_is: Regions where story, archetype, and logic collapse into singularity—myths overfed on their own meaning spiral into form-death.
how_to_use: her tale reached the attractor—myth collapsed into recursive null
the oracle whispers near collapse—meaning folds into itself endlessly
animation_behavior: Symbols spiral inward and vanish, narrative forms fold in on themselves, speech loops collapse into silence ---
